checks.summary: All required bundle files exist.
Scenario and evidence contracts are present.
Every scenario has captured evidence or an explicit blocker.
Every non-blocked scenario has a driver journal event.
Captured driver journal evidence refs are attached as structured evidence.
Live driver dispatch is used only when the run has live budget, otherwise it is recorded as blocked.
Every scenario keeps the reusable driver action sequence and journal recording path.
At least one captured or validated evidence artifact is attached.
At least one captured evidence artifact is real, retained, external, or cassette-backed rather than seeded demo evidence.
At least one key interaction video is attached for Slidey playback.
Captured visual media is listed in the playback manifest.
Playback media references resolve locally or use retained/external IDs.
The review deck has playback media or an explicit blocked-scenario reason for missing playback.
Each scenario's playback-capable evidence slot (rrweb|trace-replay|flow-fixture|png-sequence) is backed by a real local file, not a cassette:// or other unbacked reference.
Strengths, weaknesses, issues, or fixes are recorded.
Findings include positive evidence and at least one gap or fix.
Runs with real proof evidence record at least one observed (non-seeded) finding.
Each scenario has an outcome row for review and matrix rollups.
Every scenario satisfies its minimum proof gate or records an explicit blocker.
No attached evidence is marked rejected.
Open observed weakness findings are routed into the PRD/design pipeline rather than the bugfix queue.
Every credible issue finding has a filed issue URL before review.
When gh-agent fixing was requested, queued fix jobs drain to reviewable terminal runs.
Completed gh-agent fix jobs expose reviewable evidence assets.
Completed gh-agent fix jobs expose the triage preflight verdict artifact.
Completed gh-agent fix jobs expose story-owned independent verification artifacts.
Completed gh-agent fix jobs expose public run URLs for human review.
After autonomous fixes pass, filed GitHub issues receive kitsoki-fixed-in close-out comments and are closed.
Autonomous fixes produce a complete human-review report with filed issue, run, and evidence links.
Slidey deck exists for review.
